Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile relational entities, stable keys, constraints, tenant scope, and query-driven indexes; the release claim must bind source, compiler, emitted JavaScript, migrations, lockfile, package, image, configuration, and restored state; then change one RSS, Atom, namespace, entity, date, identity, or runtime-validation case and reconcile provenance. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.
